Description:
Collects comprehensive Secure Boot UEFI CA 2023 certificate update status for fleet-wide monitoring and reporting. Detection only — no changes are made to the device.

Collects 38+ data points across 5 categories:
- Secure Boot status (enabled, AvailableUpdates, AvailableUpdatesPolicy, HighConfidenceOptOut, MicrosoftUpdateManagedOptIn)
- Certificate update state (UEFICA2023Status, Error, ErrorEvent)
- Device attributes from registry (OEM manufacturer, model, firmware version/date, architecture, CanAttemptUpdateAfter throttle date)
- Event log analysis (Event IDs 1795/1796/1800/1801/1802/1803/1808 with error codes and Known Issue IDs)
- System info via WMI (OS version, last boot time, baseboard manufacturer/product, scheduled task status, WinCS key F33E0C8E002)

Outputs a single compressed JSON string to stdout for Intune collection. Supports optional -OutputPath parameter to save JSON files to a network share for GPO-based deployments.

Exit 0 = Compliant (SecureBootEnabled=True AND UEFICA2023Status=Updated)
Exit 1 = Non-compliant (informational — no remediation action taken)
Logs to: %ProgramData%\PAM - Secure Boot - Cert Update Status Detection\Detection.log
